hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then jq -nc --arg b "$branch" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:("Refusing to edit while on \($b). Create a feature branch first (e.g. git checkout -b feature/<short-name>), then follow the build/test workflow in AGENTS.md before handing changes back.")}}'; fi

jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Commits are reserved for the human reviewer. Make sure xcodebuild build and test both pass, then hand the changes off — do not run git commit yourself."}}'
